title: こういうの,ロマンでしょう？

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Resolve a Real-Life Riddle: The Mysterious Tiara
and the Manor of the Phantom Thief..." What
could this billboard be advertising? It looks
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! Having a whole manor to play the
game... Hehe, my heart's thumping already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the game starts, we're given a full
explanation by the master of the manor.
Apparently, a phantom pilferer has infiltrated the
building.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So essentially, this thief has adopted the guise of
a servant and, in order to win, we have to identify
them!
choice_data_list: And if they steal the treasure, we lose.
And if they steal the treasure, we lose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In that case... you there, the maid in the back!
May I ask you a few questions?
choice_data_list: You're sure not wasting any time!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, the situation is changing every minute. And
I'd like to get the investigation portion done
while everybody's here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion has always been one to leap into
action. It's probably best that I lend her my full
support so we can pinpoint the culprit!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This detached building is pretty shabby, isn't it?
But there might be a hint of some sort hidden in a
place like this where nobody would think to
look...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. This cloak... Its design seems way more
contemporary than the armor it adorns! Maybe it
belongs to our thief?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Just now, something's glistening above us!
Trainer, would you mind hoisting me up? I'd like
to investigate further.
choice_data_list:
Sure, but one of us might get hurt if I lose my
grip.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see... Very well. Captain, would you mind lifting
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: But of course! Ahem, pardon me. Hup!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of evidence awaits us in this
courtyard...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! Good day, fellow detectives! ♪ Have
you found anything?

text_block_list.name: Participant A
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we were just gathering up all the clues
we've got. And that's when we found...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
An abandoned shoe and some broken lipstick... I
see!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Have we already been everywhere there is to
go?
choice_data_list: We've been to every room on the manor map.
We've been to every room on the manor map.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You've been making a note of all the places
we found clues! Cheers, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Which means... that should be the last of the
material evidence. I can feel the truth
approaching...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her having such a good time puts me at
ease. I go to ask if there's anything else I can help
her with, but the moment I open my mouth...

text_block_list.name: Master of the Manor
text_block_list.text: Nwhaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh my, that voice just now...

text_block_list.name: Master of the Manor
text_block_list.text: The t-tiara... It's vanished from the safe!

text_block_list.name: Participant A
text_block_list.text:
What?! Wait... Nobody's said "game over" yet, so
that must mean...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The thief is still inside the manor! Perhaps the
tiara is too large for them to simply sneak away
with.

text_block_list.name: Participant B
text_block_list.text:
Eep! So it's not just the thief we have to find, but
the hidden tiara too?

text_block_list.name: Participant A
text_block_list.text:
Okay. If it's come to this, let's split up and search!
The thief and the tiara are both inside the manor!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay, now's our chance!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can you quietly come with me? I think
this is our chance to catch the thief. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: If we take this bookcase, and... There we go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thunk! Rumble, rumble, rumble...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I knew it—a hidden room. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Actually, secret passages hidden behind
bookcases are pretty common. You know, as
escape routes for VIPs!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And also, in circumstances such as these where
everybody's running about in a panic...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They provide an ideal means of quietly escaping
with stolen tiaras... You catch my drift? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maid
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ha! I had my suspicions you were the thief. For
one thing, your toes always seemed to be pointed
toward the safe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, people have a tendency to point their toes
towards the object of their attention. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure you're still confused! After all, the
puzzle has yet to be solved, yet we're still here!
Well, it's all thanks to Operation Ambush!
choice_data_list: I never should have doubted you!
I wonder if this is allowed...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's an honor to receive such praise.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aaand it was also pretty thrilling to uncover
someone's secret scheme again. It's been a while,
you know. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help being impressed listening to her talk
as if this were an ordinary matter. I come away
from the event with new respect for Fine Motion's
sharp mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, it might not be. The maid was certainly
quite shocked.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Still... I believe they say that in times of
emergency, one should be flexible and
unhindered by common sense or custom.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Besides, we didn't do anything that would trouble
the other participants... right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion flashes a knowing smile. Unsure how
to interpret her expression, I have no choice but
to nod along.
